name: Task
about: Track a bounded implementation task for DriftShield
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Goal

One sentence describing the user-visible or system-level outcome.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Concrete, testable outcome
- [ ] Dashboard works if frontend behavior changed
- [ ] CLI works if command behavior changed

## Test Plan

- [ ] Automated tests to run
- [ ] Manual browser verification steps if UI changed
- [ ] Manual CLI verification steps if command behavior changed

## Context

- Strategy or plan reference:
- Related issues or PRs:

## Out Of Scope

- Explicitly list what should not be changed in this task

## Human Approval Required

- [ ] Repo creation or deletion
- [ ] Repo visibility changes
- [ ] Public pushes or releases
- [ ] External service settings changes
- [ ] None

## Workflow Expectations

- Move the linked project item to `In Progress` when implementation starts
- Open or update a PR linked to this issue after local verification passes
- Keep the issue and project item `In Progress` while the PR is open or under review
- Close the issue and move the project item to `Done` only after the PR is merged
